title: General 10 Questions
wikitext:
[]: General 1.0 Questions.             Quote Post by KRandMJ » Fri Aug 05, 2016 5:18 pm General 1.0 Questions. I just re-watched 1.11, all the way to the end-credit scene that I've never seen before... I have some general questions to ask, instead of making multiple separate threads; I think its better if I present them in one. I have been trying to find some older threads pertaining to 1.0; but they have been buried by nearly a decade worth of forums. So if you can link me to particular forums then that would be a great help and I thank you in advance. I wasn't into Eva/Anime until (relatively) recently. I want to get a general vibe as to how fans reacted to Rebuild early on. 1) What was the fandom (you guys) initial reaction to the movie when it first aired? 2) What do you feel about the changes that were made compared to NGE?(For example: Kaworu on the moon/Lilith) 3) Did 1.0 as a film felt rushed? 4) What did you think of the end-credit scene? 5) So the original title for 2.0 was coined "Division"? A)Can anyone tell me when/if Anno renamed 2.0 to how it is now. B)What did people think the the meaning of "division" was SPOILER: Show

[]: Re: General 1.0 Questions.             Quote Post by pwhodges » Fri Aug 05, 2016 5:37 pm KRandMJ wrote: 1) What was the fandom (you guys) initial reaction to the movie when it first aired?

[]: Re: General 1.0 Questions.             Quote Post by Reichu » Fri Aug 05, 2016 5:52 pm I'm not even going to pretend that my memory is good enough to represent EGF's congregate opinions from however many years ago, so I'll provide some navigational pointers instead. When you're in the Rebuild subforum, at the bottom of the thread listing there should be a bar for navigating to other pages of threads. Just go to the very last page of the Rebuild subforum and work your way forward (in time, that is, which means going backward in the thread listing from higher to lower numbers) from there to get at the threads that interest you. URL-hacking is a good way to jump through the thread listings faster than the forum might manually allow. To illustrate, the hyperlinked "63" (last page) will give you this URL: Code: Select all http://forum.evageeks.org/viewforum.php?f=14&start=1550

[]: Re: General 1.0 Questions.             Quote Post by Gendo'sPapa » Sat Aug 06, 2016 1:38 am I think the response to 1.0 was pretty muted. People enjoyed the movie, they quibbled about the small changes here & there, they applauded the fully realized version of Operation Yashima but from what I can recall because the 1st movie was such a strict remake of the original show almost all the conversation was about the new elements like Mari that would start showing up in the second film.

[]: Re: General 1.0 Questions.             Quote Post by FreakyFilmFan4ever » Sun Aug 14, 2016 11:11 am "Evangelion Ha" translates into "Evangelion Break," which I guess could also mean "Division." I enjoyed 1.01 and 1.11. The movie feels less rushed to me the more movies follow it. At first I thought that they were breezing by important material, then after 2.22 I realized that the information "skipped" in 1.11 wasn't even "information" as far as NTE was concerned at all. Like pwhodges said, NTE is its own beast, and shouldn't be that closely compared to NGE.
